transcript.speaker: Speaker 01
transcript.text: So good morning, please come in.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 00
transcript.text: Good morning, daughter. I have been feeling very tired lately and I'm also feeling thirsty most of the time.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 01
transcript.text: Okay, I see. How long have you been experiencing these symptoms?

transcript.speaker: Speaker 00
transcript.text: For about 2 months now, I also feel hungry very often and need to urinate frequently.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 01
transcript.text: Yes. Okay, those can be symptoms of database. Sorry. Can you, can you, can you, can you move a little? Restate on the side. Okay, okay. So those can be symptoms of diabetes. Have you checked your blood sugar level recently?

transcript.speaker: Speaker 00
transcript.text: Yes, I did a test last week. My fasting blood sugar level was 160 mg per dl.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 01
transcript.text: This is higher than normal. Did you also check your post -mill sugar?

transcript.speaker: Speaker 00
transcript.text: The post meal was around 250 mg per dl, but I haven't checked HbA1c yet.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 01
transcript.text: Okay, based on these readings, it looks like you made this type 2 diabetes, but we need to confirm it with Hb1c test. I'll recommend you a few tests.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 00
transcript.text: Okay, doctor. What should I do meanwhile?

transcript.speaker: Speaker 01
transcript.text: First, we need to work on lifestyle changes. So reduce the sugar and redefine carbohydrates and eat more vegetables, whole grains and proteins and try to walk within at least 40 minutes daily.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 00
transcript.text: Do I need to take medicines?

transcript.speaker: Speaker 01
transcript.text: I will start you on my meditation after reviewing your Hb1c report. For now, focus on the diet and exercise. So

transcript.speaker: Speaker 01
transcript.text: it usually cannot be completely cured, but it can be controlled very well with your proper diet exercise and meditation.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 00
transcript.text: Okay, doctor. I will follow your advice.

transcript.speaker: Speaker 01
transcript.text: Great. Please, get a test and come back in one week with the reports.
